## ◈ About Me

```php
<?php

namespace App\Developers;

class YounesBarrag extends BackendDeveloper
{
    public string $location   = "Morocco 🇲🇦";
    public string $focus      = "Laravel · REST APIs · AI Integration";
    public array  $strengths  = ["Clean Architecture", "Async Pipelines", "Database Design"];
    public string $status     = "Open to backend opportunities";

    public function currentlyBuilding(): string
    {
        return "Practical Laravel backends enhanced with AI-powered workflows.";
    }
}
```

I'm a **Laravel Backend Developer** focused on building well-structured, maintainable applications. My work covers REST API design, Sanctum authentication, queue-based async processing, MySQL schema design, and integrating AI workflows into real Laravel projects. I'm actively growing my skills and looking for opportunities where I can contribute and keep improving.

---

## ◈ What I Build

<table>
  <tr>
    <td width="50%">
      <h4>⚡ REST APIs & Authentication</h4>
      Laravel REST APIs with Sanctum, resource transformers, policy-based access control, and clean response structure.
    </td>
    <td width="50%">
      <h4>🤖 AI-Integrated Backends</h4>
      Laravel backends that call AI APIs asynchronously via queues and jobs, returning structured data to clients.
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td width="50%">
      <h4>⚙️ Queues, Jobs & Events</h4>
      Async job pipelines, event broadcasting, and scheduled commands for non-blocking, reliable processing.
    </td>
    <td width="50%">
      <h4>🗄️ Database Design</h4>
      MySQL schema design, Eloquent relationships, soft deletes, scoped queries, and clean migrations.
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

---

## ◈ Projects

<table>
  <tr>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h3><a href="https://github.com/younesbarrag/ThreadForge-API">🔩 ThreadForge API</a></h3>
      <p>Headless Laravel REST API for content creators. Transforms tech articles, README files, and raw notes into ready-to-publish social posts via asynchronous AI generation.</p>
      <p>
        <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Laravel-FF2D20?style=flat-square&logo=laravel&logoColor=white"/>

        <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-7c3aed?style=flat-square"/>
      </p>
    </td>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h3><a href="https://github.com/younesbarrag/TalentMatch-Assistant-IA-">🧠 TalentMatch Assistant IA</a></h3>
      <p>AI-assisted HR recruitment tool. Compares candidate CVs against job offers, generates compatibility scores, and produces structured HR insights and recommendations.</p>
      <p>
        <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Laravel-FF2D20?style=flat-square&logo=laravel&logoColor=white"/>

        <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Policies-0ea5e9?style=flat-square"/>

    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h3><a href="https://github.com/younesbarrag/Assistant-D-penses">🧾 Assistant Dépenses</a></h3>
      <p>Smart expense assistant for merchants. Parses messy supplier receipts and extracts structured line items — products, quantities, and amounts — into clean expense records.</p>
      <p>
        <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Laravel-FF2D20?style=flat-square&logo=laravel&logoColor=white"/>

      </p>

    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h3><a href="https://github.com/younesbarrag/DEVTRACK">📋 DEVTRACK</a></h3>
      <p>Mini Jira-style project management app. Handles projects, tasks, members, roles, status tracking, and archive/restore workflows with full policy-based access control.</p>
      <p>
        <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Laravel-FF2D20?style=flat-square&logo=laravel&logoColor=white"/>

  </tr>

## ◈ Developer Mindset

> Architecture decisions outlive the code that implements them — think before you abstract.

- An API is a contract. Design it carefully; changing it later has a cost.
- Async processing is not a workaround — it's a deliberate architectural choice.
- Clean database design saves more time than any clever query ever will.
- Readable code is maintained code.

---

## ◈ 2026 Focus

<table>
  <tr>
    <td>🏗️</td>
    <td><strong>Laravel API architecture</strong> — building more structured, decoupled backends following clean architecture principles</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>🤖</td>
    <td><strong>AI integration with queues and jobs</strong> — moving beyond basic API calls to reliable async AI workflows</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>🗄️</td>
    <td><strong>Clean database design</strong> — improving schema planning, indexing, and relationship modeling</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>🐳</td>
    <td><strong>Docker and deployment basics</strong> — containerizing Laravel apps for consistent development and deployment environments</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>✅</td>
    <td><strong>Testing and code quality</strong> — building the habit of writing tests and maintainable, well-structured code</td>
  </tr>
</table>
